validation_notes: The tactical suite passed with 27 tests after adding the new immediate-report capture test.

The aggregate tests/ build failed at the final link step because it could not find the implementation libraries -lstrategic, -lships, -lgui, -ltactical, -lweapons, -ldefenses, and -lcore; this appears pre-existing and unrelated to the new tactical coverage.
